title: Telnyx API keys should not be disclosed
description: Telnyx is a cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, SIP, and fax APIs. Telnyx API keys provide access to all communication services. Exposing keys enables unauthorized calls, SMS messages, and access to phone number management.
recommendation: Remove Telnyx API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at portal.telnyx.com.
impact: Unauthorized SMS/voice calls at your expense, potential smishing campaigns, and access to phone number management.

checks.message: Telnyx API key detected (KEY## prefix). Telnyx API keys provide access to SMS messaging, voice calls, SIP trunking, fax, and number management services. Exposing this key allows unauthorized communications billed to your account, potential smishing or vishing campaigns, access to call logs and message history, and management of phone numbers. Rotate immediately at portal.telnyx.com.
Telnyx API key detected in variable assignment. Telnyx provides cloud communications infrastructure. Rotate immediately at portal.telnyx.com.
